ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "rtsp_address" TEXT /* RTSP address for streaming video from the camera */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the camera is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the camera is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the camera's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the camera's location */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of camera installation */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance date for the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the camera */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the camera was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, control) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., motion detected, tampering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting configuration */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera to which these settings apply */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution setting of the camera (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the camera in frames per second */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the camera (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "night_vision" INTEGER /* Whether night vision is enabled */,
  "motion_detection" INTEGER /* Whether motion detection is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_settings_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage record */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera linked to this storage */,
  "storage_path" TEXT /* File path where video footage is stored */,
  "available_space" REAL /* Available storage space in GB */,
  "total_space" REAL /* Total storage capacity in GB */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Video retention period in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_storage_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality configuration */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera linked to this streaming quality */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate in kbps for the video stream */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used for video encoding (e.g., H.264) */,
  "stream_type" TEXT /* Type of stream (e.g., live, recorded) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the stream (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_quality_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, operator, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, camera access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the camera group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera group */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera assigned to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_group_members_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES camera_groups ("group_id")
)
